title: Add review artifact finding mutation actions and persistence
summary: Adds workflow actions to add and update review findings
Persists mutated review artifacts back to disk
Marks attempted fixes before checking for fix diff

walkthrough.title: Implement review artifact mutation actions
changes: Reads artifact envelope and persists mutations to disk
Parses finding state, disposition, source and issue selectors

walkthrough.title: Add in-place artifact update function
changes: Adds updateWorkflowArtifact to overwrite saved envelope payload
Updates updatedAt and rewrites timestamped and latest files

walkthrough.title: Track attempted fix state before diff
changes: Sets fix findings state to attempted and disposition partial

walkthrough.title: Declare new review artifact actions
changes: Extends WorkflowNodeConfig action union with four new actions

recommendations: Add unit tests for addReviewArtifactFinding and updateReviewArtifactFindings
Add workflow integration tests for the new mutation actions
Verify finding ID generation handles gaps after deletions safely
